title: Images
description: Lets you print images on blocks
body:
Added Item: The Printaxe

The ultimate AXE+PRINTER combo

Used to chop down trees, slay monsters and print images onto picture frames

 

Added Block: Picture Frames

When placed in a rectangular shape and used with a Printaxe, it can be used to display an image

 

Picture Frame Usage

Shift + Right Click while holding the Printaxe to enter an image

Right Click on a picture frame with the Printaxe to start a selection

Right Click on a different or the same picture frame to finish the selection and print the image

optionally use a dye on the printed image to change the color of the background

 

Banner and Bed Usage

Shift + Right Click while holding the Printaxe to enter an image

Right Click on a placed banner with the Printaxe to print the image

banners can then be broken and used to decorate a shield or be worn as a cape

 

Inspecting and Copying Images

The easiest way to see the details of an block with a print on it is by using Hwyla

To copy an image, shift + right click which looking at one with the Printaxe. This will also tell you who printed it

 

F3+V Will refresh all loaded images
